title: indulgent mediterranean shrimp paella
description: tender shrimp and vegetable paella with a rich lacquer glaze, perfect for a date night dinner.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the chopped red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
add the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly to coat the rice in the oil and mix with the tomato paste.
add the chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
while the paella is cooking, prepare the lacquer glaze by mixing the shrimp paste with 1 tbsp of hot water until smooth.
after the paella has been cooking for 15-20 minutes, add the lacquer glaze and stir to combine.
add the artichoke hearts and saffron threads to the paella and stir to combine.
continue to cook the paella for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the lacquer glaze has set and the rice is lightly browned on the bottom.
